titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in P5
P5
The New Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2000 and 2010.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. Further information about the procedures followed may be found in the electronic edition of the majuscules at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Ab tag moved to after witness end tag at 20.25 by Rachel Kevern.
Gap 21 chars changed to rest of line lac at 1.33 by Rachel Kevern.
[υιο]ς changed to [εκλεκτο]ς and editorial not eadded at 1.34 by Rachel Kevern.

[ενα προς τη κεφαλη και ενα προς] replaced by rest of verse gap at 20.12, [5] changed back to [λαλει] at 16.18, [7] changed back to [γεννηση] at 16.21, [5] changed back to [εχετε] at 16.22, λ[5] changed back to λ[αλεις] and λ[5] changed back to λ[εγεις] at 16.29 by Rachel Kevern.
Rest of verse gap at 20.25 added by Rachel Kevern.
[εστι] changed to [εστιν] at 16.15 by Rachel Kevern.
λ[αλεις] changed to λ[5] and λ[εγεις] changed to λ[5] at 16.29 by Rachel Kevern.
[λαλει] changed to [5] at 16.18, [γεννηση] changed to [7] at 16.21 and [εχετε] changed to [5] at 16.22 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 16.25 corrected by David Parker.
OM changed to om entity passim, word break changed in 16.21 by David Parker.
Placement of ab and gap across page and column boundaries fixed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0 with manual adjustments.

ab.note: We previously reconstructed this word as υιος but here we have reconstructed it as εκλεκτος as read by the Editio Princeps.
